THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVILA,RAYMOND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 501 OCTAVIA STREET #6, S.F., STAYED UNTIL FEB-17-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS.BACK RENT & DAMAGES WAIVED FROM 9/1/97 THRU 2/17/98. DEFT TO LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN COND'N. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. SECURITY DEPOSIT ACCOUNTED FOR ACCORDING TO LAW. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEE. SEE JUDGMENT.
